## 📊 Stability Score Calculation

The stability score is calculated using the following weighted formula:

```
Stability Score = (
  (Test Coverage × 0.3) +
  (CI Success Rate × 0.3) +
  ((100 - P0 Bugs × 10) × 0.2) +
  (Test Pass Rate × 0.2)
) / 100
```

### Score Interpretation

- **90-100%** ✅ **Healthy**: Main branch is stable and ready for production
- **75-89%** ⚠️ **Warning**: Some issues need attention but not critical
- **0-74%** 🚨 **Critical**: Immediate action required to stabilize

## 🔧 Quick Actions

### If Stability Score < 90%

1. **Check P0 Bugs**: Review and prioritize any P0 bugs
2. **Review Failed CI Runs**: Investigate recent CI failures
3. **Test Coverage**: Run coverage report and identify gaps
4. **Recent Changes**: Review recent merges for potential issues

### Monitoring Tools

- [View Workflow Runs](https://github.com/aviswerdlow/bulk-grillers-pride/actions/workflows/stability-monitor.yml)
- [Open Issues](https://github.com/aviswerdlow/bulk-grillers-pride/issues?q=is%3Aopen+label%3Abug)
- [Coverage Report](../coverage/lcov-report/index.html)
- [CI Dashboard](https://github.com/aviswerdlow/bulk-grillers-pride/actions)

## 📝 Response Procedures

### Critical Alert (Score < 75%)

1. **Immediate Actions:**
   - Stop all feature development
   - Assign team to stability issues
   - Review and revert recent problematic changes
   - Create P0 issue for tracking

2. **Investigation:**
   - Run full test suite locally
   - Check for infrastructure issues
   - Review recent dependency updates
   - Analyze error logs

3. **Communication:**
   - Notify team via Slack/Discord
   - Update status page if applicable
   - Document incident timeline

### Warning Alert (Score 75-89%)

1. **Assessment:**
   - Review metric breakdown
   - Identify primary contributors to low score
   - Estimate effort to resolve

2. **Planning:**
   - Create issues for identified problems
   - Prioritize fixes in next sprint
   - Assign owners to each issue

3. **Monitoring:**
   - Increase monitoring frequency
   - Set up additional alerts
   - Track progress daily
